# Contributing to LedgerAI

The authoritative contribution guide is **not** here. It lives in the documentation:

**→ [`docs/03-engineering/CONTRIBUTING.md`](../docs/03-engineering/CONTRIBUTING.md)**

That document owns how a change is routed to its owning document, reviewed, approved, kept in sync with
documentation, and merged — including which review a change owes. For the wider engineering playbook, read
[`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md).

This file exists only because GitHub looks for a `CONTRIBUTING` file at the repository level. It adds no policy of
its own and must not become a second contribution guide. If it ever appears to disagree with the document above,
**that document wins.**

Before opening a pull request or issue:

- Read [`docs/03-engineering/CONTRIBUTING.md`](../docs/03-engineering/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- Identify the document that **owns** your change before writing code.
- Keep code and its governing document in sync — the document changes before or with the code.
